title: Worked Example - Assigning the Same Initial Salary

content.problemStatement:
In this example, we demonstrate how `chained assignment` allows `multiple variables` to be assigned the `same initial salary` in a single statement.
 
**When executed, the code will show:**
```java
Employee 1 Salary: $3000
Employee 2 Salary: $3000
Employee 3 Salary: $3000
```
